Actor.description: Who or what performed/experienced the event.

objectType.description: The actor type (one of the bdm: actor types).
objectType.title: Objecttype

Actor.title: Actor

Attachment.description: A reference to an additional file/data object associated with the event.
Attachment.title: Attachment

Authority.description: The authority that generated the event.
Authority.title: Authority

Context.description: Contextual information for an event; scoping payload under `extensions`.

extensions.description: Contextual payload keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.
extensions.title: Extensions

Context.title: Context

Event.description: A single event/statement — the xAPI-style envelope (actor / verb / object) for one observed occurrence.

actor.description: Who or what performed/experienced the event — `{objectType, id, name?}`, where objectType is one of the actor types below. (Renamed from `agent`; an Agent is one type of actor — BDM deviation D5.)
actor.title: Actor

attachments.description: References to additional files/data associated with the event (stimulus blobs, recording files, timeseries), each with its own metadata. Payloads are not inlined.
attachments.title: Attachments

authority.description: The authority that generated the event (e.g. the client app/developer). Populated by the LRS.
authority.title: Authority

context.description: Contextual information (study, studyflow, and the session→activity→runtime→block→trial scoping hierarchy) under `context.extensions`, keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.
context.title: Context

object.description: What the action was performed on — `{objectType, id, name?}`, where objectType is one of the object types below.
object.title: Object

result.description: The outcome of the event (e.g. accuracy, response_time, score). Domain-specific payload lives under `result.extensions` keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.
result.title: Result

stored.description: When the event was stored in the LRS. Populated by the LRS.
stored.title: Stored

timestamp.description: When the event occurred, as an ISO 8601 / RFC 9557 datetime with timezone offset.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

updated.description: When the event was last updated in the LRS. Populated by the LRS.
updated.title: Updated

verb.description: The action that occurred, drawn from the canonical verb vocabulary below.
verb.title: Verb

version.description: The associated BDM/schema version (e.g. `v26.0608`). Typically populated by the LRS.
version.title: Version

Event.title: Event

EventBatch.description: A batch of events — the shape returned by a collection endpoint.
EventBatch.title: EventBatch

EventObject.description: What the action was performed on.

objectType.description: The object type (one of the bdm: object types).
objectType.title: Objecttype

EventObject.title: EventObject

Extensions.description: An open map of `bdm:*` extension keys to arbitrary values.
Extensions.title: Extensions

Result.description: The outcome of an event; domain payload under `extensions`.

extensions.description: Domain-specific payload keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.
extensions.title: Extensions

Result.title: Result
